caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black sweatshirt with "BOSS TALK" in gold lettering, and large over-ear headphones sits at a desk in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a repeated logo that says "HUSTLE" beneath several gold stars. A blue banner above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk to his right sits a black container with red and white text that says "TALK OUT". To his left is a black equipment case with a small logo. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, looking toward someone off-camera to his right. His facial expression and posture remain largely consistent, with only slight shifts in his gaze and head position as he listens or prepares to speak.
